Setup: Limit long at 24690 pullback support in uptrend from 24617
Invalidation: SL hit — pullback went deeper than expected
Notes: Uptrend higher lows were 24674→24691→24707→24709 but the pullback broke through 24690 support. The alert system worked — notified on position close. Need to place limit at stronger levels or widen SL.

Setup: Limit short at 24690 resistance in what looked like downtrend
Notes: Only saw lower highs (downtrend) but missed the higher lows (compression/triangle). Was NOT a clean downtrend — it was a converging pattern. Lesson: always check BOTH sides (highs AND lows) before determining trend. In compression, don't take directional trades — wait for the breakout.
